LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PHYSICIANS' SERVICE DBA BLUE SHIELD OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT, DEFENDANT BLUE SHIELD'S DEMURRER TO THE FIRST AND SECOND CAUSES OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT AND BREACH OF THE IMPLIED COVENANT ARE SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. DR. GHOSH'S LACK OF ANY CONTRACTUAL RELATIONSHIP WITH BLUE SHIELD IS FATAL TO HIS CONTRACT CLAIMS. DR. GHOSH IS NOT A THIRD PARTY BENEFICIARY OF HIS PATIENT'S CONTRACT WITH BLUE SHIELD. BLUE SHIELD WITHDREW ITS DEMURRER TO THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MITCH LYON, CSR #6840 (302/HK)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-22-2016 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-24-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. GLENN R. KANTOR, ESQ. of Kantor & Kantor LLP, Tel No. 818-886-2525 appearing telephonically for the Plaintiff;
Atty. KATRINA DELA CRUZ, ESQ. of Manatt, Phelps & Phillips, LLP, Tel No. 310-312-4178 appearing for the Defendant California Physicians' Service dba Blue Shield of California.

Matter argued and submitted by counsel. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. As to DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PHYSICIANS' SERVICE DBA BLUE SHIELD OF CALIFORNIA'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT, Defendant Blue Shield's demurrer to the first and second causes of action for breach of contract and breach of the implied covenant are sustained without leave to amend. Dr. Ghosh's lack of any contractual relationship with Blue Shield is fatal to his contract claims. Dr. Ghosh is not a third party beneficiary of his patient's contract with Blue Shield. Blue Shield withdrew its demurrer to the third cause of action. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840 (302/HK)
